description: Module change confirmed — adding Newsletter; £39 charged

values.paymentLine: Your card was charged £39 for the Newsletter setup fee. You'll see it on your statement as MODUFORGE.

expected.subject: Module change done ✓
expected.body:
Hi Alex,

Your module change is sorted.

What changed:
  • Added: Newsletter
  • Removed: (none)

Payment:
  • Your card was charged £39 for the Newsletter setup fee. You'll see it on your statement as MODUFORGE.

Your new totals:
  • Setup fee: £246
  • Monthly: £31/month

Any new modules are now showing on your hub — open it from
the button below and finish setting them up. Anything you
removed is hidden but your data is safe in case you change
your mind.

Heads-up: that was your one pre-launch module swap. After
launch you can still change modules — just reply and I'll
quote it.

— Ben
